steps.title: Recognize the quotation requirement
steps.content: The task demands a quotation that supports a claim about Tharpe's contribution to rock 'n' roll—not just any comment about her abilities.

steps.title: Match the quotation to the contribution
steps.content: Choice C incorporates “the unquestioned founding mother,” which directly establishes Tharpe's foundational role in creating rock 'n' roll. A and B omit quotations entirely, while D quotes Roxie Moore's comment about Tharpe's emotional impact as a singer—irrelevant to a genre-contribution claim. That matches choice C — C is correct.
